notes: Spec 38 promoted the inline security note into a top-level `## Security model` section per the spec 36 template, wrapped `gh pr view --json url,title,body` output in `<untrusted_pr_body>` boundary tags, and switched both `gh pr create` and `gh pr edit` to `--body-file` so PR body content never reaches argv. W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view` and persists regardless of mitigations. Severity is provisional: the local scanner was not run for this PR (`SNYK_TOKEN` not available; CI ran in skip mode per `evals/security/CLAUDE.md`). Maintainer to refresh with `bash evals/security/scan.sh --update-baselines --confirm` before merge per the `evals/security/CLAUDE.md` rule.
